---
title: "STAT 348 Sampling Techniques"
engine: knitr
format: html
metadata-files:
  - ../../_website.yaml
---

This page lists the R demonstration for STAT 348 Sampling Techniques. Most examples and datasets are taken from [**Sampling: Design and Analysis**, 2nd Edition, by Sharon L. Lohr, published by Brooks/Cole.](https://www.sharonlohr.com/sampling-design-and-analysis-2e)

## R Demonstration

1. [Basics of R and Rmarkdown](introR/introR.html)
2. [Simple Random Sampling](SRS/srs.html)
3. [Stratified Random Sampling](STRAT/strata.html)
4. [Ratio and Regression Estimation](Ratio_Reg_est/ratio.html)
5. [Cluster Sampling](Cluster/cluster.html)
6. [Unequal Probability Sampling](UPS/ups.html)
7. R markdown files for generating the above html files can be found from [this Github folder](https://github.com/longhaiSK/longhaiSK.github.io/tree/main/teaching/stat348_rdemo/).

## [Googlesheets Calculator for Sampling Survey](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/18EbvJqHDn1uNI4pyXmkF0nV1-hZNCmmEpUk8DmwFblg/edit?usp=sharing)
